title: Accompanying materials for publication: The Use of Gaming and Geodata Visualization in Preparation of High Arctic Research Fieldwork
author: Kramer, Daniel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Stored in this file are 3 workflows and a video. 
 Workflow 1: Scale-depending steps to create a 3D model from various sources. 
 Workflow 2: Steps in Blender to prepare 3D model for Unreal Engine or visualisation. 
 Workflow 3: Steps in Unreal Engine to prepare 3D model for gaming. 
 Video: Snow_microstructure.mp4 is an animated flight through a 3D snow scan at the micro-scale. 
 Video: Holographic.mp4 is the same scan but displayed on a holographic display. Please note that is is very difficult to capture the 3D effect of the display in a 2D video.
